expected_transcript: He began a confused complaint against the wizard who had vanished behind the curtain on the left.

source.attribution: Panayotov, V., Chen, G., Povey, D. and Khudanpur, S. (2015). LibriSpeech: an ASR corpus based on public domain audio books. ICASSP.
source.derivation: Converted from the source FLAC to mono 16 kHz PCM WAV with FFmpeg; no user or production audio is included.
